target_user: Solo practice therapist, 0-2 years in private practice, credentialing with their first 3 insurance panels
core_promise: Get credentialed with 3 insurance panels in 90 days without hiring a consultant
ai_leverage: AI synthesized credentialing requirements for 15+ major panels and formatted them as actionable checklists
differentiator: The only resource that tells you which panels to apply to first based on your state and specialty, not generic advice
deliverables: Panel Selection Matrix (25 panels with approval rates and timelines)
Common Rejection Reasons and Fixes Guide
distribution_channels: Private Practice Boot Camp Facebook Group (50k members)
Direct to Headway and Alma therapist communities
